name: 5' x 7' Outdoor Rug Denim Dye - Threshold™: Woven Polypropylene & Polyester, Machine Made Area Rug
description: Add color and texture to your deck space with this Denim Dye Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Made from fabric that's comfortable out in the elements, this eye-catching outdoor rug features an allover dye print that adds warmth and style to your outdoor gathering area. Plus, the rug has a spray latex backing to help keep it in place wherever you choose to arrange it. Keep your front porch warm and inviting even before the door opens with this blue outdoor rug.
